bugs_found.description: signNoZero<float> returns 0 for NaN, violates ne_zero. Loop callers: rtl_direct_mission_land.cpp:73, mission_base.cpp:80 get step=0 (infinite loop risk). TECS.cpp:198, FlightTaskOrbit.cpp:138 get 0 (incorrect sign).

ci_status: healthy - toolchain pinned v4.29.0, cache on lake-manifest
run14_tasks: Task 7 (Critique) + Task 6 (Correspondence) - added WelfordMean+Lerp to both docs
notes: Rat.sub_add_cancel/Rat.sub_self: IMPLICIT args - use bare (no obvious args)
Rat.add_le_add_right: shared term on RIGHT (a+c <= b+c). For left-shared: add_comm first.
x^0=1: use 'have h0 := by simp' (simp knows pow_zero)
Rat.add_le_add_left: c+a <= c+b iff a<=b (note: c on LEFT)
AlphaFilter ge_sample fix: use Rat.neg_le_neg on (alpha*(state-sample) <= state-sample), then rewrite -(alpha*(state-sample)) = alpha*(sample-state) using <- Rat.mul_neg + Rat.neg_sub
AlphaFilter iterate_formula fix: use 'induction n generalizing state' (NOT plain induction)
CI at .github/workflows/lean-ci.yml - working, lake update step added run12

WelfordMean mean_step_algebra: need ↑(n+1) NOT ↑n+1 in function def. 'let nR : Rat := ↑(s.count+1)' keeps cast explicit. Then step1 proves add_mul + div_mul_cancel, then h_cast rewrites ↑(n+1) to ↑n+1.
ring tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib - use omega for linear Int arithmetic
linarith tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib (it's in Mathlib) - use omega for Int
succ_cast_ne_zero: exact_mod_cast Nat.succ_ne_zero n works for (↑(n+1):Rat) ≠ 0
push_cast; rfl works for ↑(n+1) = ↑n + 1 in Rat
Rat.inv_mul_cancel (not div_mul_cancel): rw [Rat.div_def, Rat.mul_assoc, Rat.inv_mul_cancel _ hn, Rat.mul_one]
lerp_half sorry: needs explicit Rat 1/2 = (1:Rat)/(2:Rat) inv arithmetic. 1-1/2 not reducible via decide. Manual proof via Rat.inv_mul needed.
lerp_alt_form: simp only [sub_eq_add_neg, add_mul, mul_add, neg_mul, mul_neg, one_mul, add_comm, add_left_comm] works
lerp boundary proofs: use Rat.sub_eq_add_neg+neg_zero+add_zero pattern for 1-0=1; use Rat.sub_self for 1-1=0
Next high-priority Task 3 target: negate_int16 (decide-provable, ~30 lines)
